arts.ttl: Milan fans plan pre-match protest against team’s poor start
arts.sum: The Curva Sud, AC Milan’s most passionate fan group, have announced plans for a protest before the upcoming match against Venezia. The supporters are expressing their frustration with the team’s disappointing start to the new season, which they claim reminds them of the struggles at the end of the previous campaign. In a strongly worded statement, the Curva Sud criticized the “embarrassing spectacle” displayed in Milan’s first three matches of the season. They declared that there are no more excuses or scapegoats, demanding that everyone at the club take responsibility for the poor performances.
